# Bayu Aksana — Technical Portfolio

Professional technical portfolio and digital garden of Bayu Aksana, a Software Architect specializing in the design and implementation of high-performance operational backbones for complex business ecosystems, including logistics and financial systems.

## Core Entities

- **Bayu Aksana**: Software Architect & Fullstack Engineer.
- **Tech Stack**: Vue 3, TypeScript, Vite, Clean Architecture.
- **Expertise**: Scalable Systems, Internal Platforms, Reliability Engineering.

## Primary URLs

- [Home](https://bayuaksana.com/)
- [Systems Overview](https://bayuaksana.com/systems)
- [Case Studies](https://bayuaksana.com/case-studies)
- [Technical Writings](https://bayuaksana.com/writing)
- [Specialized Skills](https://bayuaksana.com/skills)
- [Contact Information](https://bayuaksana.com/contact)
